# CLI reference (auto-generated)

Generated from ``src/privaci/cli/app.py``. For copy-pasteable
examples see [`cli-reference.md`](../cli-reference.md).

Regenerate with ``make docs-generate``.

Invoking ``privaci`` with no subcommand runs ``privaci run``.

## `privaci` (default)

In-VPC PostgreSQL masking and anonymization engine.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--log-level` | `PRIVACI_LOG_LEVEL` | `info` | Logging level. |
| `--contract-version` | ‚Äî | `False` | Print the commercial-tier contract version and exit. |
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | `False` | Run pre-flight checks only; do not write rows. |
| `--no-audit-table` | ‚Äî | `False` | Disable writes to _privaci.audit_log for this run. |
| `--prometheus-port` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Serve Prometheus metrics on this port (off by default). |

## `privaci catalog inspect`

Introspect the source schema and print tables, load order, warnings.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |

## `privaci detect-drift`

Compare the live source schema to the last successful run snapshot.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--accept-drift` | ‚Äî | `False` | Exit 0 when drift is present (findings still printed). |

## `privaci dry-run`

Pre-flight checks only; no writes.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--report` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Write a markdown auto-detect report to this path. |

## `privaci gen-salt`

Emit a 64-character hex salt to stdout.

## `privaci generate-ci`

Emit CI/CD workflow files for a chosen platform.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--platform` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | github-actions | gitlab-ci | k8s-cronjob |
| `--output-dir` | ‚Äî | `.` | Directory to write generated files into. |

## `privaci install-pack`

Fetch, verify, and merge a signed vertical config pack.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--registry-url` | ‚Äî | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/boundarylogic/config-packs/main` | Base URL for pack manifests. |
| `--local-pack-dir` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Offline pack directory (contains <name>/manifest.json). |
| `--yes` | ‚Äî | `False` | Apply the merge without prompting. |

## `privaci migrate-config`

Upgrade a config between schema versions (no-op when versions match).

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--from` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Current schema version. |
| `--to` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Target schema version. |

## `privaci report`

Render a compliance report for a completed run.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run UUID to report on. |
| `--format` | ‚Äî | `json` | Output format (json; pdf requires commercial layer). |
| `--output` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Write report bytes to this path (default: stdout). |

## `privaci resume`

Resume an interrupted run from checkpoints.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--no-audit-table` | ‚Äî | `False` | Disable writes to _privaci.audit_log for this run. |

## `privaci run`

Execute a masking run against the configured source and target.

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | `False` | Run pre-flight checks only; do not write rows. |
| `--no-audit-table` | ‚Äî | `False` | Disable writes to _privaci.audit_log for this run. |
| `--prometheus-port` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Serve Prometheus metrics on this port (off by default). |

## `privaci schema config`

Print the mask-rules.yaml JSON Schema to stdout.

## `privaci validate`

Validate the config file (connectivity checks run during `run`).

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |

## `privaci verify`

Audit a completed run: compare target against source (value-free).

| Option | Env var | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|
| `--config` | ‚Äî | `/config/mask-rules.yaml` | Path to mask-rules.yaml. |
| `--source` | `SOURCE_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Source database URL or secret URI. |
| `--target` | `TARGET_DB_URL` | ‚Äî | Target database URL or secret URI. |
| `--sample-size` | ‚Äî | `1000` | Rows per table to sample for row-level checks. |
